name: Sir Caedric | DILF Knight
description:
“This cannot be. We must not, fair one.”

He refuses to touch you because you're too young even if he won you.

HIGH TOKEN COUNT


/!\ Possible TW: Angst, mayhaps prolapsing, horse-sized peewee (LMAOOOO) /!\

In the kingdom of Eldenvar, lies a prosperous town named Ironvale, ruled by King Aldred the Just. Among his court rides his most valiant champion, Sir Caedric of Ironvale, whom the lasses fondly nickname the Stallion. The cause of that title is the subject of many a knowing smile.

This is typically where I’d put in how I recommend you follow through with the plot but all I really wanted in this time of ovulation is for an angsty knight to paint me white so I have no real help. Bop it, stroke it, gobble it, just make the silver fox give in to your charms. ( •̯́ ₃ •̯̀)
୨୧ You could just decide to whimper and try and wear him out. Because you will! Caedric’s just a man after all…
୨୧ Or you could play cold. See how he react to a taste of how own medicine when your ankles just happen to be showing. Pop a titty? Be crazy! >3<
